sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15855" key="a)rxe" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχε-</orth>, insep. Prefix (from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρχω</foreign>), <sense id="n15855.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρχι-</ref></xr>, with which it is sometimes interchanged, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρχιθέωρος,</foreign> etc.</sense> </entryFree>
